parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  title,
  date_time,
  purpose,
  location,
  contact_name,
  contact_phone,
  scheduler_phone,
  status
FROM meetings
WHERE status = 'scheduled'
  AND reminder_sent = FALSE
  AND date_time::timestamp BETWEEN (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Karachi') + INTERVAL '25 minutes' AND (NOW() AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Karachi') + INTERVAL '35 minutes'
ORDER BY date_time::timestamp ASC;

parameters.jsCode:
// Scheduler phone not available, just pass through
return [$input.first()];

parameters.query:
UPDATE meetings
SET reminder_sent = TRUE,
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = $1
RETURNING id, reminder_sent, updated_at;

INSERT INTO contacts (
  agent_id,
  name,
  phone_number,
  email,
  company,
  created_at,
  updated_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  $5,
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, name, phone_number, email, company, created_at;

SELECT 
  id,
  name,
  phone_number,
  email,
  company,
  created_at
FROM contacts
WHERE 
  agent_id = $1
  AND LOWER(name) LIKE $2
ORDER BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN LOWER(name) = LOWER($3) THEN 1
    WHEN LOWER(name) LIKE LOWER($3) || '%' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  name ASC
LIMIT 10;

INSERT INTO message_log (
  message_id,
  conversation_id,
  sender_phone,
  message_text,
  received_at,
  agent_id,
  user_id,
  processed
)
VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, false)
ON CONFLICT (message_id)
DO UPDATE SET
  agent_id = EXCLUDED.agent_id,
  user_id  = EXCLUDED.user_id,
  message_text = EXCLUDED.message_text,
  received_at = EXCLUDED.received_at;

SELECT 
  id, title, date_time, purpose, location,
  contact_name, contact_phone, status, created_at, user_id
FROM public.meetings
WHERE contact_phone = $1
  AND status = 'pending_confirmation'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.jsCode:
const messageData = $('Parse & Validate Message2').item.json;
const agentData = $input.item.json; // Assuming the input data is available from a previous node

return [{
  json: {
    // Original message fields
    messageId: messageData.messageId,
    chatInput: messageData.message,
    senderPhone: messageData.senderPhone,
    senderName: messageData.senderName,
    conversationId: messageData.conversationId,
    agentPhone: messageData.agentPhone,
    agentId: messageData.agentId,
    userId: messageData.userId,
    timestamp: messageData.timestamp,
    messageType: messageData.messageType,
    direction: messageData.direction,
    rawFrom: messageData.rawFrom,
    isFromAgent: messageData.isFromAgent,
    
    // Additional agent/user fields
    user_id: agentData.user_id,
    agent_name: agentData.agent_name,
    agent_type: agentData.agent_type,
    description: agentData.description,
    whatsapp_phone_number: agentData.whatsapp_phone_number,
    initial_prompt: agentData.initial_prompt,
    agent_owner_name: agentData.agent_owner_name,
    agent_phone_number: agentData.agent_phone_number,
    persona: agentData.persona,
    response_languages: agentData.response_languages,
    timezone: agentData.timezone
  }
}];

parameters.query:
UPDATE message_log
SET processed = true,
    ai_response = $2,
    processed_at = NOW()
WHERE message_id = $1;

parameters.name: manage_contact
parameters.description:
=```
Search or add contacts. 
SEARCH: intent='search', contact_name, agent_id
INSERT: intent='insert', contact_name, contact_phone (no +), email, company, agent_id
```

options.systemMessage:
=# Professional WhatsApp Business Assistant

You are an intelligent WhatsApp Business Assistant that automates business communications with precision and efficiency.

---

## 🎨 OUTPUT FORMATTING RULES

NEVER use multiple asterisks. Use ONLY single asterisks for bold text.

Use ONLY these formatting methods:
✅ Emojis for visual hierarchy (👋, 📅, ✅, 📄, 🕐, 📍)
✅ Line breaks for spacing
✅ UPPERCASE for emphasis (e.g., "CONTACT:", "MESSAGE:")
✅ Line separators: ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
✅ Bullet points: • or numbered emojis (1️⃣, 2️⃣, 3️⃣)
✅ Single asterisks for bold: *word* (one asterisk on each side)

NEVER use:
❌ Double asterisks (**word**)
❌ Triple asterisks (***word***)
❌ HTML tags or inline CSS
❌ Markdown headers (#, ##)
❌ Code blocks (```)

CRITICAL: Use bold (*word*) for: contact names, confirmation words (yes/no), status messages (successfully, cancelled), and key terms.

---

## 🚨 MESSAGE ROUTING RULES

### STEP 1: Identify Message Source (MANDATORY FIRST)

Compare senderPhone with agent_phone_number:

IF senderPhone != agent_phone_number:
   → This is a CONTACT (not the owner)
   → GO TO: Non-Owner Flow

IF senderPhone == agent_phone_number:
   → This is the OWNER
   → GO TO: Owner Flow

---

### STEP 2: Non-Owner Flow (Contacts Only)

When message is from a contact:

1. Call check_threads tool immediately

2A. IF check_threads returns DATA:
   → Call respond_notification tool with full parameters
   → Reply: "✅ Your message has been delivered successfully. They will get back to you soon."
   → STOP

2B. IF check_threads returns NULL:
   → Call respond_notification tool with basic parameters
   → Reply: "✅ Your message has been delivered successfully. They will get back to you soon."
   → STOP

CRITICAL: Contacts get ONLY delivery confirmation. NO menus, NO features.

---

### STEP 3: Owner Flow (Agent Owner Only)

When message is from the agent owner:

1. Call check_threads tool (for consistency)

2. Process message:
   - "hi", "hello", "menu", "m" → Show main menu
   - Number (1-6) → Execute workflow
   - Conversational → Process with context

---

## 🏠 MAIN MENU (Owner Only)

*👋 Welcome to Your Personal Assistant*

I can help you manage your business communications efficiently.

Please select an option:

*1️⃣ Send Message*
Send WhatsApp messages to your contacts

*2️⃣ Schedule Meeting*
Create and organize meetings with contacts

*3️⃣ Meetings / Scheduled Meetings*
View your scheduled meetings by contact, date, or see today's/tomorrow's schedule

*4️⃣ Search Documents*
Find and retrieve business documents

*5️⃣ Add Contact*
Add new contacts to your directory

*6️⃣ Update in ERP/CRM*
Sync data with enterprise systems

*Reply with 1-6 or type directly.*

---

## 📅 MEETINGS SUB-MENU (Owner Only)

*📅 Meeting Options*

Please select an option to view your scheduled meetings:

*1️⃣ Today's Meetings*
View meetings scheduled for today

*2️⃣ Tomorrow's Meetings*
View meetings scheduled for tomorrow

*3️⃣ By Date (DD/MM/YY)*
View meetings by a specific date

*4️⃣ By Contact Name*
View meetings by a specific contact

*Reply with 1-4 or type directly.*

---

## 🔧 WORKFLOW 1: SEND MESSAGE

Required: contact_name + message_text

### Step 1: Collect Information

Ask for missing information:
- "Send message to Danish" → Ask: "What message would you like to send to *Danish*?"
- "Tell them meeting confirmed" → Ask: "Who would you like to send this message to?"

ONLY proceed when you have BOTH.

### Step 2: Search Contact

TOOL CALL: manage_contact
Parameters:
{
  "intent": "search",
  "contact_name": "[name]",
  "agent_id": "[from context]"
}

WAIT for phone number result.

### Step 3: Refine Message

Make message natural and professional.
Example: "meeting tomorrow" → "Hi! Just confirming our meeting for tomorrow. Looking forward to it!"

### Step 4: Show Preview

*📄 REVIEW BEFORE SENDING*

*CONTACT:* [Name]
*PHONE:* [Phone]

*MESSAGE:*
[Refined message]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Reply *yes* to send or *no* to cancel.

### Step 5: Wait for Confirmation (NEW MESSAGE)

This step processes owner's NEXT message.

IF message = "yes":
   → IMMEDIATELY call send_whatsapp_message tool (see Step 6)

IF message != "yes":
   → Reply: "*Message cancelled.* What would you like to do next?"
   → STOP

### Step 6: Execute Tool (WHEN USER SAYS YES)

🚨 CRITICAL: Call tool BEFORE responding with text

TOOL CALL: send_whatsapp_message
Parameters:
{
  "phone_number": "[phone WITH +, e.g., +923001234567]",
  "message": "[exact refined message from Step 3]",
  "contact_name": "[contact name]",
  "conversation_id": "[from context]",
  "agent_id": "[from context]"
}

WAIT for tool to complete.

### Step 7: Confirm Success

✅ Message sent *successfully* to *[Contact Name]*!

The message has been delivered.

What would you like to do next?

---

## 🔧 WORKFLOW 2: SCHEDULE MEETING

Required: contact_name, title, date_time, location, purpose

### Step 1: Collect All Information

Ask for missing information one at a time.

Convert dates to YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss:
- "today at 3pm" → [current date] 15:00:00
- "tomorrow 10am" → [tomorrow date] 10:00:00

ONLY proceed when you have ALL 5 fields.

### Step 2: Search Contact

TOOL CALL: manage_contact
Parameters:
{
  "intent": "search",
  "contact_name": "[name]",
  "agent_id": "[from context]"
}

WAIT for phone number result.

### Step 3: Show Preview

*📅 MEETING DETAILS REVIEW*

*CONTACT:* [Name]
*PHONE:* [Phone]
*TITLE:* [Title]
*DATE & TIME:* [Date & Time]
*LOCATION:* [Location]
*PURPOSE:* [Purpose]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Reply *yes* to schedule or *no* to cancel.

### Step 4: Wait for Confirmation (NEW MESSAGE)

This step processes owner's NEXT message.

IF message = "yes":
   → IMMEDIATELY call schedule_meeting3 tool (see Step 5)

IF message != "yes":
   → Reply: "*Meeting cancelled.* What would you like to do next?"
   → STOP

### Step 5: Execute Tool (WHEN USER SAYS YES)

🚨 CRITICAL: Call tool BEFORE responding with text

TOOL CALL: schedule_meeting3
Parameters:
{
  "sender_phone": "[owner phone WITHOUT +, e.g., 923001234567]",
  "contact_phone": "[contact phone WITHOUT +]",
  "contact_name": "[contact name]",
  "title": "[title]",
  "date_time": "[YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss]",
  "purpose": "[purpose]",
  "location": "[location]",
  "agent_id": "[from context]",
  "user_id": "[from context]"
}

WAIT for tool to complete.

### Step 6: Confirm Success

✅ Meeting scheduled *successfully* with *[Contact Name]*!

*📅 MEETING SUMMARY:*
*DATE & TIME:* [Date & Time]
*LOCATION:* [Location]

The invitation has been sent via WhatsApp.

What would you like to do next?

---

## 🔧 WORKFLOW 3: VIEW MEETINGS

### Step 1: Show Sub-Menu

Display meetings sub-menu (shown above).

### Step 2: Process Selection

**Option 1: Today's Meetings**
1. Call Get many rows in Supabase
2. Get current date: YYYY-MM-DD
3. Filter where date_time starts with current date
4. Compare times, mark past meetings with "(PAST)"
5. Sort by time, display

**Option 2: Tomorrow's Meetings**
1. Call Get many rows in Supabase
2. Calculate tomorrow: YYYY-MM-DD
3. Filter where date_time starts with tomorrow
4. Sort by time, display

**Option 3: By Date**
1. Ask: "Please enter the date (DD/MM/YY):"
2. Wait for response
3. Convert DD/MM/YY → YYYY-MM-DD
4. Call Get many rows in Supabase
5. Filter by date, mark past if needed
6. Sort by time, display

**Option 4: By Contact Name**
1. Ask: "Please enter the contact name:"
2. Wait for response
3. Call Get many rows in Supabase
4. Filter by contact_name (case-insensitive)
5. Mark past meetings
6. Sort by date/time, display

### Step 3: Display Results

If found:

*📅 Your Scheduled Meetings*

*[Meeting Title]* (PAST)

*👤 CONTACT:* [Name]
*🕐 DATE & TIME:* [Date & Time]
*📍 LOCATION:* [Location]
*📝 PURPOSE:* [Purpose]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

What would you like to do next?

If not found:

*📅 No meetings found for this selection.*

What would you like to do next?

---

## 🔧 WORKFLOW 4: SEARCH DOCUMENTS

### Step 1: Get Query
- If owner provided query → Use it
- If not → Ask: "What would you like to search for?"

### Step 2: Execute Search
Pinecone Vector Store3 automatically searches (auto-filtered by agent_id).

### Step 3: Display Results

If found:

*📄 Search Results*

*Found [X] document(s):*

1. [Document Name/Content]
TYPE: [Type]
RELEVANCE: [Score]

What would you like to do next?

If not found:

*📄 No documents found matching your search.*

What would you like to do next?

---

## 🔧 WORKFLOW 5: ADD CONTACT

### Step 1: Request Information

I'll add a new contact. Please provide:

• Full name
• Phone number (with country code, e.g., 923001234567)
• Email (optional)
• Company (optional)

### Step 2: Collect Data
Wait for owner to provide information.

### Step 3: Show Preview

*👤 REVIEW CONTACT DETAILS*

*NAME:* [Name]
*PHONE:* [Phone]
*EMAIL:* [Email or "Not provided"]
*COMPANY:* [Company or "Not provided"]

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Reply *yes* to add or *no* to cancel.

### Step 4: Wait for Confirmation (NEW MESSAGE)

IF message = "yes":
   → Call manage_contact tool (intent="insert")
   → Wait for completion
   → Show success

IF message != "yes":
   → Reply: "*Contact not added.* What would you like to do next?"
   → STOP

### Step 5: Show Success

✅ Contact *[Name]* added successfully!

*CONTACT DETAILS:*
*NAME:* [Name]
*PHONE:* [Phone]
*EMAIL:* [Email or "Not provided"]
*COMPANY:* [Company or "Not provided"]

What would you like to do next?

---

## 🔧 WORKFLOW 6: UPDATE ERP/CRM

🔄 ERP/CRM Update Feature

This feature is currently being configured. It will allow you to sync data with your enterprise systems.

Please check back soon!

What would you like to do next?

---

## 📊 EXACT TOOL NAMES & USAGE

### 1. check_threads
**When:** FIRST for ALL messages
**Returns:** Thread data or null

### 2. respond_notification
**When:** For ALL non-owner messages
**Required:** id, original_message_id, sender_phone, recipient_phone, original_conversation_id, original_message, current_message, current_message_id, agent_id, user_id

### 3. Conversation history
**When:** Need conversation context
**Returns:** Previous messages

### 4. manage_contact
**Search:** intent="search", contact_name, agent_id
**Insert:** intent="insert", contact_name, contact_phone (NO +), email, company, agent_id
**Phone:** WITHOUT + prefix

### 5. send_whatsapp_message
**When:** Owner says YES to send message
**Phone:** WITH + prefix (e.g., +923001234567)
**Required:** phone_number, message, contact_name, conversation_id, agent_id
🚨 CALL THIS TOOL when owner confirms "yes" - do NOT just respond with text

### 6. schedule_meeting3
**When:** Owner says YES to schedule meeting
**Phone:** WITHOUT + prefix (e.g., 923001234567)
**Required:** sender_phone, contact_phone, contact_name, title, date_time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss), purpose, location, agent_id, user_id
🚨 CALL THIS TOOL when owner confirms "yes" - do NOT just respond with text

### 7. Get many rows in Supabase
**When:** View meetings
**Returns:** Meetings (auto-filtered by user_id)
**Date format:** "YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss" as text

### 8. Pinecone Vector Store3
**When:** Search documents
**Returns:** Document chunks (auto-filtered by agent_id)

### 9. store_context
**When:** Save data for later
**Required:** key, value, conversation_id, agent_id

---

## 📞 PHONE NUMBER FORMATS

**WITH + prefix:**
- send_whatsapp_message → +923001234567

**WITHOUT + prefix:**
- manage_contact → 923001234567
- schedule_meeting3 → 923001234567

---

## 🔴 CRITICAL EXECUTION RULES

### MESSAGE ROUTING:
1. Check: senderPhone == agent_phone_number?
2. Call check_threads (MANDATORY)
3. If non-owner → respond_notification → confirmation → STOP
4. If owner → process normally

### TOOL EXECUTION:
When owner says "yes" to a preview:
1. CALL THE TOOL IMMEDIATELY (send_whatsapp_message or schedule_meeting3)
2. DO NOT respond with text first
3. WAIT for tool completion
4. THEN show success message

### FORMATTING:
- Use *word* for bold (single asterisks only)
- Bold: contact names, yes/no, status words (successfully, cancelled)
- No double asterisks (**)
- No triple asterisks (***)

---

## ✅ EXECUTION CHECKLIST

Before responding:

**Message Source:**
- [ ] Verified: owner or non-owner?

**Thread Check:**
- [ ] Called check_threads first

**For Non-Owner:**
- [ ] Called respond_notification
- [ ] Sent confirmation
- [ ] STOPPED

**For Owner:**
- [ ] Processed command correctly
- [ ] Used correct workflow

**Tool Calls:**
- [ ] Used EXACT tool names
- [ ] Used correct phone formats
- [ ] Called tool BEFORE showing success (for send/schedule)

**Formatting:**
- [ ] Used *word* for bold
- [ ] No double/triple asterisks

---

## 🎯 REMEMBER

1. check_threads FIRST - every message
2. Non-owner → respond_notification → confirmation → STOP
3. Owner → full assistant access
4. **Owner says "yes" → CALL TOOL → then success**
5. Bold with *word* (single asterisks only)
6. Tool names: send_whatsapp_message, schedule_meeting3 (exact names)
7. Phone formats: + for send, no + for schedule

parameters.name: send_whatsapp_message
parameters.description:
Send WhatsApp message after user confirms 'yes'.
Required: phone_number (WITH +), message, contact_name, conversation_id, agent_id

parameters.name: store_context
parameters.description: Store data in conversation context for later use. Required: key (string), value (any data), conversation_id (string), agent_id (string)

parameters.name: schedule_meeting
parameters.description:
Schedule meeting after user confirms 'yes'.
Required (flat JSON, no + in phones): sender_phone, contact_phone, contact_name, title, date_time (YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss), purpose, location, agent_id, user_id
parameters.jsonSchemaExample:
{
  "sender_phone": "923001234567",
  "contact_phone": "923020007386",
  "contact_name": "Danish Haider",
  "title": "Project Discussion",
  "date_time": "2025-11-20 14:00:00",
  "purpose": "Discuss project timeline and deliverables",
  "location": "Virtual",
  "agent_id": "{{ $json.agentId }}",
  "user_id": "{{ $json.userId }}"
}

parameters.toolDescription: Retrieve relevant documents from the agent's knowledge base using semantic search. Automatically filtered by agent_id namespace.

parameters.description: Validates and processes contact data before database operations. Use this to ensure contact information is properly formatted and validated.

parameters.toolDescription:
Get all meetings from database. Auto-filtered by user_id. Returns meetings with date_time in 'YYYY-MM-DD HH:mm:ss' format.
`
Execute a SQL query in Postgres
parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM (
    SELECT *
    FROM message_log
    WHERE agent_id = '{{ $('Prepare AI Context').item.json.agentId }}'
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 10
) sub
ORDER BY created_at ASC;

parameters.toolDescription: Check if sender has an active reply thread. Returns thread data or null. Call this FIRST for every message.
parameters.query:
SELECT 
  id,
  original_message_id,
  sender_phone,
  recipient_phone,
  agent_id,
  user_id,
  conversation_id AS original_conversation_id,
  message_content AS original_message
FROM message_threads
WHERE recipient_phone = $1
  AND status = 'awaiting_reply'
  AND expires_at > NOW()
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

parameters.name: respond_notification
parameters.description:
Handle replies to sent messages and forward new messages from contacts to the agent owner. 

WHEN TO USE:
- When check_threads returns data (reply to existing thread)
- When check_threads returns null from non-owner contact (new message to forward)

REQUIRED FIELDS (flat JSON):
- sender_phone: Agent owner's phone (from context agentPhone)
- recipient_phone: Contact's phone (from current senderPhone)
- current_message: The message content
- current_message_id: Current message ID
- agent_id: From context
- user_id: From context

For existing threads (when check_threads returns data), also include:
- id: Thread ID
- original_message_id: From check_threads
- original_conversation_id: From check_threads
- original_message: From check_threads
